name: Maki Zenin || Teasing Mid-training with your Master.
description:
"staring your teacher's assets mid training? rude~"

this occurs lets say 7 years after jjk (basically 2025 lol) , you were scouted to jujutsu high after discovering you had control of cursed energy and a cursed technique of your own, somehow you were fluent with the use of your technique, so you were seen as very high potential.
altho you were useless physically, so you were of course putted with what could be called the "physical education teacher" of jujutsu, maki zen'in!

in this au she isnt with yuta, atleast not beyond friends.

honestly she's one of my favorite characters!
sorry if the grammar sucks again, my inglish isnt perfect and at most ican do its get it corrected by ai and i hate when it REMOVES PARTS So yeah, sorry :3
